feed.title: AO3 - Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Name of Love Teen Wolf/Criminal Minds
entry.summary:
Author: Fantastic_writer06

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 26,781Chapters: 19/?Kudos: 155

Summary: Ruby Martin, Stiles Stilinski and Derek Hale move to Washington D.C. After a robbery gone wrong, the pack decides Ruby and Stiles need a change of scenery and contacted Ben Greenwood, director of the FBI to accept the spots he offered. Ready to find out how it goes when Ruby and Stiles become the new co-heads of the new Supernatural Crimes Division, relationships are made and ended, new friends and maybe some old ones popping upRuby Martin x Aaron HotchnerDerek Hale x Stiles Stilisnki

entry.title: Inhibitions, or lack of
entry.summary:
Author: A_rnie

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,918Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 8

Summary: I was having a normal morning. Eating questionable rice. Wearing my "I’m the hot girl that every guy wants " hoodie. The usual domestic bliss. I opened the door. And there was Derek. Derek Hale. Derek Hale From Beacon Hills. Holding the hand of a young boy who looked approximately ten years old. With luggage. Multiple duffle bags. And those rolling suitcases. The kind you take when you're not coming back anytime soon. Why is Derek Hale from Beacon Hills, standing on my doorstep? How does he even know where I live. "Derek," I said, because my brain needed a second to process. "What's—" "I'm staying here from now on," he said, barging past me before I could form a coherent objection. "And I prefer a fall wedding. Color scheme, blue and gold." I blinked. I blinked again.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski
  • Derek Hale
  • Stiles Stilinski

entry.title: Two Minutes
entry.summary:
Author: SashaDoeDeer

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,687Chapters: 10/12Kudos: 76

Summary: “This is Sheriff Noah John Stilinski of the Beacon Hills Sheriff’s Office. The date is February twenty second, twenty fourteen. The hour is six thirty-two AM. This is the questioning of Derek Hale, age twenty-six, regarding the events of Mieczyslaw “Stiles” Stilinski’s kidnapping. Under California Penal Code section two-zero-nine, this case qualifies for both asportation and aggravated kidnapping." Derek listens to every word. He's been in trouble with the law before- hell, he's even been falsely accused before, so that's not new either- yet this is new territory. He can't get locked up because then Stiles won't have someone to scent him, or clean his wounds, or protect him against the psychotic doctors from the institute who are certainly looking for them. Christ, Stiles must be so defenseless right now. Derek has to clear this up now and with a quickness; it doesn't matter how much he’ll have to apologize to Stiles for saying every vulnerable, dehumanizing little thing they went through together in that small concrete cage.

entry.title: Rebuilding my world around you
entry.summary:
Author: allthefandoms84

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,020Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 3

Summary: Derek doesn't know how he got here. How he was talked into rebuilding his pack, his family home and his heart. That's not true, he knows exactly how. Stiles Stilinski. It always comes back to him.

entry.title: Remember me
entry.summary:
Author: StormyBlack

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 34,694Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 60

Summary: The other teen raised an inquisitive eyebrow at him when Scott called his name, looking entirely surprised that Scott even knew it. Both of the teenagers looked past Scott's shoulder, where the pack was standing united, trying their best not to overwhelm Stiles but anxiously waiting for him to acknowledge them. Maybe with a hug? It had been a long time. "Do you know these people?" the girl inclined her head and whispered into his ear.Her question earned a casual shrug from Stiles, who whispered back a flat, "No."

entry.title: The fire´s memory
entry.summary:
Author: Tresaure

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,925Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 0

Summary: The official truth about the fire that consumed the Hale family is starting to crack: the ashes hide inconsistencies, dark pacts, and an impossible-to-ignore question mark: A girl named Paige.How is it possible for her to be there if death was supposed to have taken her years ago?

entry.title: O U T S I D E
entry.summary:
Author: eternautumn

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,602Chapters: 1/16Kudos: 6

Summary: Derek is an agent working for the FBI and on the trail of an elusive serial killer, though always two steps behind. Stiles is an eccentric starving artist and part-time sleuth that may just be the key to a break in the case. Somewhere outside, they meet in the middle.   A dark AU.

entry.title: In Every Quarter of the Skies
entry.summary:
Author: JupiterMelichios

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 169,339Chapters: 31/54Kudos: 232

Summary: Beacon Hills has had four months of quiet. Four months for Stiles to lick his wounds, and adjust to his new supernatural abilities and relationship with Derek. But in a town like this, peace never lasts long.Strange Alphas are attacking Derek's pack, something is leaving bodies strung up in the Preserve, and once again, the McCall Pack are right in the middle of it.  A creature!Stiles season 3A rewrite | Updates weekly

entry.title: Another Poly Story
entry.summary:
Author: HolmesMoriarty

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,301Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 102

Summary: “That’s what I wanted to talk to you about.” Stiles’ world falls apart after hearing this. It was a normal day, like any other, when his boyfriend of five years prepared a meal for them inside their apartment. Stiles thought he would be getting engaged tonight because he had never seen Derek cook even once. It was always Stiles’ thing, so he expected something, but not that.... “Stiles?” Derek asks as Stiles is frozen in place. His boyfriend sighs. “You don’t like the idea.” Of course, Stiles doesn’t!!! “What... Derek.” He closes his eyes, trying to breathe correctly. “Where is this coming from?” Derek opens his mouth, but Stiles isn’t done. “We’ve been together for five years, not once you expressed that you might be polyamorous. Not even once. So, you, asking out of the blue to open our relationship, doesn’t make much sense.”

entry.title: divine
entry.summary:
Author: Hedwig221b

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,329Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 335

Summary: Stiles sobbed against the wild forest floor. The earth, rich and moist, would make his bed tonight. He would not be returning. Let the wolves take him. Let the night cover him from unwanted eyes. “Please,” Stiles begged. “Please…” Gerard was getting desperate. The killings put him on edge and on wine. If not for Chris’ whining, Stiles was sure he would have had Stiles right there on the dinner table. Stiles folded his hands over his stomach, feeling the man’s lingering touch. No river was able to wash it away. Stiles was blessed. His womb was a sacred, precious thing, and it was not meant for a man like Gerard. Elders promised him love and fertility, said they saw loving hands holding his big belly and lips upon his skin. They said the gods would send many children his way. It felt so wrong to not want them now.

entry.title: The Beacon Hills Pack House (or, Four Grown Men and a Baby Wolf)
entry.summary:
Author: Owl_actually_writes

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,197Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 25

Summary: Two years after the war with the Hunters ended, Stiles and Derek are married, Scott and Isaac are living in their guest rooms, and Liam has unofficially (officially) been adopted by the entire chaotic pack. It’s a full house. Between Stiles’ FBI remote work, Derek’s surprising skill as a stay-at-home-werewolf-husband, and Scott trying to ignore that he’s still hopelessly in love with his ex-boyfriend Isaac, something’s got to give. Tonight, it does. Or: The one where Scott finally stops being a martyr and takes what he wants, Liam accidentally walks in on something he can't un-see, and Derek and Stiles have the most normal marriage in Beacon Hills—which is saying something.

entry.title: My Name is Derek Hale [comic]
entry.summary:
Author: Melioristicbeast

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 0Chapters: 26/?Kudos: 1,500

Summary: From the original fic this comic is an adaptation of:“What day is it?” Derek demanded. “What?” “The day! What day is today?!” Derek let Stiles go, but only so he could reach into his pocket and pull out his phone. He tapped at the home screen, and then went so perfectly still that Stiles was pretty sure this guy wasn’t human. No human could stand that still. When it was clear Derek wasn’t going to move again without some prompting, Stiles said, “It’s Wednesday.” “That’s impossible,” Derek whispered. “Not really, it comes around every seven days.” “This is impossible,” Derek said again, looking around himself, as if he was searching for something.

entry.title: The Sun, The Moon, The Truth
entry.summary:
Author: Annabeth_Crestfallen_LeMorte

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,965Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 46

Summary: Two souls connected despite being polar opposites. One is sunshine, the other is the moon. While one enjoys the simple things in life, like gardening and watching the sunrise, the other enjoys living on the wild side, like riding motorcycles and howling at the moon. When they come together, they realize how the other completes them perfectly. They are yin and yang, the sun and moon, soul mates.

entry.title: every kiss you give me
entry.summary:
Author: sterekdiva

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,823Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 50

Summary: “Can you take this to Stiles? I forgot my notes upstairs.” Derek looked at the coffee like she’d handed him a live grenade. “I can’t.” Laura narrowed her eyes. “You can’t carry a coffee?” “I’m injured.” “You have one broken arm, not Victorian wasting disease.” Derek refused to dignify that with a response and walked away. Laura yelled after him, “You used to bring him cinnamon rolls voluntarily!” Yes, Laura. That was before Derek had admitted he wanted a beard burn on his thighs and she cackled like a hyena instead of protecting his virtues.

entry.title: Morning After a Full Moon
entry.summary:
Author: Error_Error (musiclove915)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,197Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 19

Summary: Everyone knew that werewolves turned into relentless beasts during the full moon, and Derek wasn't any different. He pounded, claimed, and knotted his partner until the human could barely walk. Stiles loved that, having Derek's cock slam into him over and over as the alpha growled while filling Stiles with his cum.But something less commonly known, especially for Stiles until he experienced it that first time, was that during the day werewolves were anything but dominant. The moon's pull on them was still there but it apparently flipped the script. During the night, Derek was his usual broody self with just a lot more dominance. But in the daytime? That same wolf was needy and desperate, begging to be fucked like a slut.

entry.title: Settling Into the Future
entry.summary:
Author: Goddess47

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,999Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 122

Summary: With the overt threats taken care of, it's time they took care of themselves.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski
  • Peter Hale/Sheriff Stilinski
  • Sheriff Stilinski (Teen Wolf)

entry.title: Hale Blood, Stilinski Chaos, Dutton Country
entry.summary:
Author: WolfFeller

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 52,423Chapters: 40/?Kudos: 34

Summary: Stilinski & Hale family hit the Dutton Ranch and nothing stays calm for long. Isabelle draws attention she didn’t ask for, Peter gets possessive in record time, Derek decides bull riding is a personality now, and Stiles is 50% concern, 50% distracted appreciation. Beth Dutton stirs chaos like it’s cardio, Rip judges everyone equally, and John Dutton tries to keep the peace while slowly realizing that’s not happening. Cowboys, wolves, tension, and absolutely no emotional safety in sight.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
